mapper.select: SELECT id, display_name, profile FROM users WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET display_name = #{displayName}, profile = #{profile}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users (id, display_name, profile, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{displayName}, #{profile}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
